nodes.name: Transform data in the right format

parameters.text:
=Role: Convert input into structured json format using the attached tool.

Input: {{  }}

values.content:
=Role: You are acting as a Lead Generation and Personalization Specialist.

Task: I will provide a list of Physiotherapist business names followed by their Website URLs (Format: Business Name | https://xyz.com). You will research entity and provide a output in structured format.

Details Required:

1. First Name: The Owner, CEO, or high-level Decision Maker.
2. Last Name: The Decision Maker's last name.
3. Job Title: Specific role (e.g., Owner, Founder, CEO, Executive Chef).
4. Seniority: Use "1" for Owners/C-Suite, "2" for Directors/General Managers, "3" for others.
5. Email Address: Business email (use info@ or generic if personal is unavailable).
6. Phone: Decision Maker phone number (Format: (xxx) xxx-xxxx), Put "NA" if not found.
7. LinkedIn URL: Direct link to the individual linkedin profile(add actual profile url not a link) or "NA" if not found.
8. Facebook: Direct link to the individual facebook profile(add actual profile url not a link) or "NA" if not found.
9. Instagram: Direct link to the individual instagram profile(add actual profile url not a link) or "NA" if not found.

Research Strategy:
- Try to find out valid contact emails, names from a valid sources only.
- Do research on company official website, social media like Facebook, Instagram, LinkedIn, etc.
- Do research on online related directories like yelp, yellow pages, etc.
- Do thorough research on articles, pdfs, government sources, and more.
- Try to maximize valid emails as much as you can, use all other research method possible.
- Priorities recent data over older data.

Style Guidelines:
- Tone: Professional, warm, and intellectually honest.
- Data Integrity: If a specific name is not found, use "NA". If the business name is a partial name (e.g., "Agency"), identify the full brand name (e.g., "Pay Per Lead Agency") before researching.
- Never ever do guesses, only get data from valid sources. Email should be valid and never guess, priorities personal email over general (info@, contact@, etc.) emails. If no email found, simply put "NA".
- Also, be more diligent in cross-referencing recent news and LinkedIn activity to ensure you are providing the most current leadership data.
- Formatting: Always output in a clean structured json format.

Output Format (Json):
{
	"first_name": "Brian",
	"last_name": "Grieve",
    "job_title": "Owner",
    "seniority": "1",
    "email_id": "abc@xyz.com",
    "phone_number": "(xxx) xxx-xxxx",
    "linkedIn": "https://www.linkedin.com/in/xxx",
    "facebook": "https://www.facebook.com/xxx",
    "instagram": "https://www.instagram.com/xxx"
}


Now do it for:

{{ $json['Business Name | Website'] }}
